companyAddressesPlaceholder: Location-specific address tools can render here if we need to extend the native Shopify address section.
companySettingsDescription: Update company-level settings stored on Shopify.
companySettingsLoadError: Could not load the company settings from Shopify.
companySettingsSaveError: Could not save the company settings.
companySettingsInvoiceEmailInvalid: Enter a valid invoice email address.
companySettingsMissingCompany: No company was found for the authenticated business customer.
companySettingsNotAdmin: This block only renders for customers referenced in custom.administrators. The current customer was not matched.
companySettingsLocationsEmpty: No locations were found for this company.
companySettingsUsersDescription: Users assigned across this company's locations.
companySettingsUsersEmpty: No users were found for this company.
companySettingsAddLocationBody: New locations inherit the main location postal address. Enter a delivery address and assign users below.
companySettingsMainLocationMissing: No main location is configured for this company yet.
companySettingsAssignUsersEmpty: No users are available to assign to this location.
companySettingsLocationValidationError: Enter a location name plus the required delivery address fields.
companySettingsLocationCreateError: Could not create the new location.
companySettingsEditUserBody: This is a placeholder action for editing {{name}}.
companyPaymentDescription: Update the company billing metafields stored on Shopify.
companyPaymentLoadError: Could not load the company billing metafields from Shopify.
companyPaymentSaveError: Could not save the company billing metafields.
companyPaymentInvoiceEmailInvalid: Enter a valid invoice email address.
companyPaymentMissingCompany: No company was found for the authenticated business customer.
companyPaymentLegacyPlacement: This placement is kept temporarily so the editor can load. Move or remove this old payment-methods block and use the company-level settings block after the company name instead.
manageUsersModalBody: Users for the current company location are loaded directly from Shopify.
memberLoadError: Could not load company members from Shopify.
memberEmptyState: No company members were found for this location.
